original_snippet_context: News related to the Convenio de Taubaté and coffee valorization.
relevant_quote: Em S. Paulo, o presidente do Estado assignou o decreto regulando a cobrança da taxa, por sacca de café, de conformidade com o Convenio de Taubaté.
justification: This mention simply states a fact about the decree related to the Convênio de Taubaté, which proposed backing the conversion office with funds related to coffee valorization, without expressing an opinion about the Caixa de Conversão itself.
